name: fable-ish-codex
description: Verification-gated workflow plugin for Codex tasks. Adds lightweight hooks for task classification, risky command checks, verification tracking, and stop-time completion review.

interface.shortDescription: Verification-gated workflow hooks for Codex tasks
interface.longDescription: Adds lightweight Codex hooks for task classification, risky command checks, verification tracking, and stop-time completion review while preserving the fable-ish skill workflow.
defaultPrompt: Use fable-ish verification for this task
